Several apple trees on public trails. Unknown type, but decent amount of fruits. I harvested a five gallon bucket of apples from here in one trip and made tasty applesauce.
1425 N State Rd, Ionia, MI 48846, USA
Hickory trees lining this road. The nuts tend to fall into the gravel by the side of the road, so they're easy to gather! Access: Private but overhanging.
Falling Fruit access: Private but overhanging.
